description.p: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, living in the world but not entirely part of it.
Your elf character has a variety of natural abilities.
Ability Score Increase. Your Dexterity score increases by 2.
Speed. Your base walking speed is 30 feet.

setters.set: Adran, Aelar, Aramil, Arannis, Aust, Beiro, Berrian, Carric, Enialis, Erdan, Erevan, Galinndan, Hadarai, Heian, Himo, Immeral, Ivellios, Laucian, Mindartis, Paelias, Peren, Quarion, Riardon, Rolen, Soveliss, Thamior, Tharivol, Theren, Varis

Adrie, Althaea, Anastrianna, Andraste, Antinua, Bethrynna, Birel, Caelynn, Drusilia, Enna, Felosial, Ielenia, Jelenneth, Keyleth, Leshanna, Lia, Meriele, Mialee, Naivara, Quelenna, Quillathe, Sariel, Shanairra, Shava, Silaqui, Theirastra, Thia, Vadania, Valanthe, Xanaphia
Ara, Bryn, Del, Eryn, Faen, Innil, Lael, Mella, Naill, Naeris, Phann, Rael, Rinn, Sai, Syllin, Thia, Vall
Amakiir, Amastacia, Galanodel, Holimion, Ilphelkiir, Liadon, Meliamne, Nai'lo, Siannodel, Xiloscient

description.p: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

sheet.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

description.p: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

sheet.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

description.p: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious, for 4 hours a day.

sheet.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply for 4 hours a day.

description.p: Ancient divides among the elven people resulted in three main subraces: high elves, wood elves, and dark elves.
As a high elf, you have a keen mind and a mastery of at least the basics of magic.
Ability Score Increase. Your Intelligence score increases by 1.
